extraction_method: Ghidra 12.1.2 headless disassembly, ExtractVocab.java v2 (dual-pattern token extraction + shape filter + stoplist)
confidence: medium-high - richest, cleanest extraction of the batch after Scheduler; verb-prefixed tokens grouped as commands vs noun-only tokens as params by naming convention, not verified by per-function tracing.
notes: Whole-house audio group/zone/volume management -- group creation, room membership, mute, and volume-slider commands. Comfortably the richest non-Scheduler result; a strong candidate for a full per-function trace (like Scheduler got) if this agent matters for real use, since the command list alone is already highly actionable.
